step_rationale: Ketone body and energetic biomarker; metabolic stress marker not plaque-specific.
mechanism: A ketone body and metabolic intermediate reflecting energy metabolism dysregulation and ischemic metabolic stress in MI.

references.title: The role of ketone bodies in oxidized LDL-induced cell proliferation and lipid accumulation of macrophages.
NMR plasma metabolomics study of patients overcoming acute myocardial infarction: in the first 12 h after onset of chest pain with statistical discrimination towards metabolomic biomarkers.
